name: CardVille 1.0.56 Lobby Asset Visibility HUD NonOverlap
notes: Fixes lobby HUD/UI overlap, locks uploaded building and NPC assets to visible runtime keys, enlarges building/NPC placement, and keeps critical lobby PNG loading stable.
label: Visible user lobby assets + HUD non-overlap
description: Moves top HUD/ribbon/settings/bottom hint into safe lanes, makes uploaded castle/library/lab/forest and shopkeeper/alchemist/scholar/forest-sage NPC assets visibly assigned, and verifies lobby composition.
